ground_truth.title: Free Blockchain Course - 101 Blockchains
ground_truth.main_content: Discover the world of Blockchain and the benefits it holds for your career with our Blockchain Fundamentals Free Course. Blockchain is a revolutionary distributed ledger technology that has changed the traditional approach to exchanging information and financial transactions. The blockchain free course is a beginner-level tool for any professional wanting to familiarize themselves with blockchain and its essential concepts. You will understand how blockchain technology works and familiarize yourself with important terms such as consensus mechanisms, DLT, and smart contracts. The course covers important blockchain terms like double-spending, validators, working mechanisms and advantages of smart contracts, different ways of fuelling digital transformation with blockchain technology, and industries leading the path in blockchain adoption. The Blockchain Fundamentals Free Course offers comprehensive lessons on blockchain fundamentals, explaining its working mechanisms and essential terms with interactive exercises that help reinforce learning outcomes.

Enroll for FREE and start your journey in blockchain and web3 today.
